daily_summary: Over the past 24 hours, gold prices have shown an overall upward trend, moving from a low of 4428.0 to a peak of 4573.1. The trend appears to have strong momentum initially, but the later part of the day indicates some stabilization around the 4540s. The turning point identified at index 17 marks a shift where prices peaked and began to show signs of consolidation, suggesting market participants may be taking a pause before further movement.
